description_long: This is a compact, two-story house with a simple rectangular footprint and a steeply sloped shed roof. The front facade features a prominent wooden door with a small window, flanked by a single square window on one side and a set of three rectangular windows above, framed by visible wooden beams. The exterior walls are finished in a muted beige color, contrasted by dark brown trim and roof. The house sits on a small, angular stone step at the entryway, adding a subtle architectural detail. The side and rear elevations are plain, lacking windows or ornamentation, emphasizing the utilitarian design. The overall style suggests a modest, traditional urban dwelling, possibly inspired by European or early American townhouses.
description: A compact, two-story beige house with a steep brown shed roof, wooden trim, and a prominent front door with windows. The design is simple and traditional, with minimal ornamentation and a small stone step at the entry.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entry door, a square window to the left, three rectangular windows above, and visible wooden trim.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the steeply sloped roof and plain beige wall with no windows or features.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a completely plain beige wall with no windows, doors, or trim.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the sloped roof and unadorned beige wall.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with grouped upper windows
attribute_entryway_design: Wooden door with a small window, angular stone step, and minimal trim; no porch or overhang.
